# TKTLVTag

**Type Alias**

The type used to identify TLV format tags.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias TKTLVTag = UInt64
```

## Discussion

Although some encodings tags do not have any size restrictions, the CryptoTokenKit framework supports tag lengths only up to 64-bits.

## Creating TLV Records

- **init(tag:value:)**: Initializes a BER-TLV record with the specified tag and value.
- **init(tag:records:)**: Initializes a BER-TLV record with the specified tag and an array of TLV subrecords.
